plan review requested for Step 1 (Create Provider Brand SVG Icons)

log.outcome: The plan correctly identifies the scope of work: replacing Lucide icons with inline SVG brand logos while preserving the existing API, sizing, colors, and fallback behavior. The approach is sound and the blast radius is appropriately limited to the ProviderIcon component itself.

ProviderIcon now displays actual brand logos (Anthropic 'A' monogram, OpenAI spiral, Gemini sparkle, Ollama llama) instead of generic Lucide icons. All 23 ProviderIcon tests pass, along with full dashboard test suite (1220 tests). Changeset created for patch release.
